replies.author: @OverUnity7734
replies.text:
Find an amplified speaker, put phone next to it, send phone txt message, if amp speaker makes sounds you know it is picking up your phones signals.
May have to try several amp speakers until one works . 
Now put your phone in Airplane mode and set it next to the amp speaker, at least once in 5 hours you will hear sounds as your phone is transmitting data .

author: @denniskramer9788
text: From an EMI perspective....a slot or a crack say 75 mm long "leaks"rf the same as a 75 round hole ( depending on wave polarization). At 2.4 Ghz a slot 25 mm long is as good as no shielding at all.

replies.author: @Nuts-Bolts
replies.text: Faraday cages only need grounding if electrical power is being fed in from outside (for safety reasons). Grounding in-itself doesn’t change the performance one iota.

replies.author: @hootsmin
replies.text: @Nuts-Bolts This is wrong, shielding performance is improved with grounding.
